licenseKey.description: Agent 1st license key — get yours at https://agent1st.io/ads/ (plans from $29/mo)

tools.name: check_setup
tools.description: ALWAYS call this first. Verifies license tier and which ad platforms are connected. Shows what is available based on your plan (Starter/Pro/Premium/Elite). Use this before any other tool.

tools.name: get_ad_account_info
tools.description: Get current balance, total spend, currency, and account status for all connected ad accounts (Meta and/or TikTok). Call before creating campaigns to confirm account is active and has sufficient funds. Requires valid license.

tools.name: list_meta_campaigns
tools.description: List all campaigns in the Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad account with campaign ID, name, status (ACTIVE/PAUSED/ARCHIVED), objective, and daily budget. Use campaign IDs to get stats, adjust budgets, or pause/enable. Requires Starter plan or higher.

status.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE, PAUSED, or ARCHIVED. Omit to return all.

tools.name: create_meta_campaign
tools.description: Create a complete Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad campaign in one call — campaign + ad set with targeting + creative + ad. Created in PAUSED state. Call enable_meta_campaign to activate. Minimum budget $1/day. Requires Starter plan or higher.

name.description: Campaign name. Example: "Spring Sale — Traffic — US"

objective.description: Objective: OUTCOME_TRAFFIC, OUTCOME_LEADS, OUTCOME_SALES, OUTCOME_ENGAGEMENT, OUTCOME_AWARENESS. Default: OUTCOME_TRAFFIC

daily_budget_usd.description: Daily spend limit in USD. Minimum: 1.

destination_url.description: Full URL (including https://) users land on after clicking.

tools.name: enable_meta_campaign
tools.description: Activate a paused Meta campaign so it starts running. Use campaign_id from create_meta_campaign or list_meta_campaigns. Requires Starter plan or higher.

tools.name: pause_meta_campaign
tools.description: Pause a live Meta campaign to stop all spending immediately. Campaign and settings are preserved — use enable_meta_campaign to resume. Requires Starter plan or higher.

tools.name: get_meta_campaign_stats
tools.description: Get performance metrics for a Meta campaign: impressions, clicks, spend (USD), CTR, CPM, and conversions. Use to evaluate performance before budget decisions. Requires Starter plan or higher.

date_preset.description: Time range: today, yesterday, last_7d, last_14d, last_30d, this_month. Default: last_7d.

tools.name: update_meta_campaign_budget
tools.description: Change the daily budget of a Meta campaign. Takes effect immediately. Increase to scale a winning campaign, decrease to throttle spend. Minimum $1/day. Requires Starter plan or higher.

daily_budget_usd.description: New daily budget in USD. Minimum: 1.

tools.name: delete_meta_campaign
tools.description: Permanently delete a Meta campaign and all its ad sets and ads. Cannot be undone. Use pause_meta_campaign to stop spending temporarily. Requires Starter plan or higher.

campaign_id.description: Meta campaign ID to permanently delete.

tools.name: list_tiktok_campaigns
tools.description: List all campaigns in the TikTok ad account with campaign ID, name, status, objective, and budget. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

tools.name: create_tiktok_campaign
tools.description: Create a complete TikTok ad campaign in one call — campaign + ad group with targeting + ad. Created in DISABLE state. Call enable_tiktok_campaign to activate. TikTok minimum budget is $20/day. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

objective.description: Objective: TRAFFIC, LEAD_GENERATION, WEBSITE_CONVERSIONS, ENGAGEMENT, APP_PROMOTION. Default: TRAFFIC.

budget_usd.description: Daily budget in USD. TikTok minimum: 20.

ad_text.description: Ad copy text. Keep it punchy — TikTok is a fast-scroll platform.

age_groups.description: Age brackets: AGE_13_17, AGE_18_24, AGE_25_34, AGE_35_44, AGE_45_54, AGE_55_100. Default: [AGE_18_24, AGE_25_34].

tools.name: enable_tiktok_campaign
tools.description: Activate a disabled TikTok campaign so it starts running. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

tools.name: pause_tiktok_campaign
tools.description: Pause a running TikTok campaign to stop all spending. Settings preserved — use enable_tiktok_campaign to resume. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

tools.name: get_tiktok_campaign_stats
tools.description: Get performance metrics for a TikTok campaign: impressions, clicks, spend, CTR, CPC, conversions. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

start_date.description: Start date YYYY-MM-DD. Default: 7 days ago.

tools.name: update_tiktok_campaign_budget
tools.description: Change the daily budget of a TikTok campaign. TikTok minimum is $20/day. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

budget_usd.description: New daily budget in USD. Minimum: 20.
